scripts.build: npm run build -w electron-main && npm run build -w frontend && npm run package
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w electron-main
scripts.test: npm run test -w electron-main && npm run test -w frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w frontend && npm run typecheck -w electron-main
scripts.build:electron: npm run build -w electron-main && npm run build -w frontend
